Solutions for Every Selling SituationPlease select a section below.





Handling Objections - Closes

Declare your financial freedom by building your arsenal of closes. Be prepared to use one or a combination of these closes after showing figures to the buyer and faced with an objection. 



Stall

Stall Closes contains over 15 different ways to handle objections with concerns to the buyer stalling the decision-making process.





Product

Product Closes contains over 10 different ways to handle objections with concerns to the product.





Time

Time Closes contains 9 different ways to handle objections with concerns to the buyers’ time.





Basic

Basic Closes contains over 60 closes to be used in the final stages of the sales process.





Advanced

Advanced Closes contains over 40 closes to be used in the final stages of the sales process.





Affordable

Affordability Closes contains over 30 different ways to handle objections of the buyers’ affordability concerns.





Difference

Difference Closes contains over 15 different ways to handle objections with concerns to “difference” in price.





Payment

Payment Closes contains over 15 different ways to handle objections of the buyers’ payment concerns.





Handling Objections - Objections

Preparation is key to handling objections before they occur. How you handle the simplest to most complex objections will make or break the sale! 





Greeting

The Greeting is more often the first point of contact with the buyer. Learn over 30 strategies to handling objections in this crucial step of the sales process.





Demonstration

Explore 5 strategies to handling objections in this second step of the sales process, during the demonstration, to move the needle along to the close!





Write-Up

The final stage before the close, during the write-up there will be objections that the buyer will present to stall the sales process. Learn over 25 ways to handles these objections and you’ll be on your way to becoming a Master Closer!





General

Learn strategies to handle the most common, general objections to occur during the entire sales process.
